title: 12 Best Telegram Groups for AI Startup Founders (2026)
description: A curated list of active Telegram communities for AI founders, indie hackers, and SaaS builders.
markdown:
# Best Telegram Groups for AI Startup Founders

Here are the communities worth joining this year:

1. **AI Founders Hub** — daily discussion on building AI products. Join at https://t.me/aifoundershub
2. **Indie Hackers Lounge** — ship-and-tell for solo builders: @indiehackerslounge
3. **SaaS Growth Lab** — growth tactics for early-stage SaaS. t.me/saasgrowthlab
4. **LLM Builders** — RAG, agents, fine-tuning talk → https://t.me/llmbuilders
5. **Private Founder Circle** (invite only): https://t.me/+Ab3xKz9QwErTyUiO

Contact the editor at hello@example.com for additions.

title: Top Telegram channels for AI marketing and SaaS growth
description: Channels covering AI marketing, automation, and lead generation.
markdown:
## AI Marketing Channels on Telegram

- **AI Marketing Daily** — @aimarketingdaily — news + tactics every morning.
- **Automation Nerds** — t.me/automationnerds — no-code and AI automation.
- **GrowthHackers TG** — https://t.me/growthhackerstg
- Also check out our newsletter (not Telegram): https://example.org/newsletter
- Unrelated: follow the author on X @some_person (this is not a Telegram group).
